category_sources: source_facts.description says mongosh is the MongoDB Shell for connecting, configuring, querying, and working with MongoDB databases; official repository calls it The MongoDB Shell.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description identifies MongoDB Shell; official repository heading says The MongoDB Shell.
docs_sources: Official mongosh README points users to MongoDB Docs for official documentation at mongodb.com/docs/mongodb-shell.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is the official mongodb-js/mongosh repository, and official README describes it as the MongoDB Shell monorepo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions shell, connect, configure, query; official repository documents REPL and shell usage.
